creator: lapo@lapo.it
text:
New upstream release.

Fix: PORTNAME=      searchstatus
-PORTVERSION=   1.18
-DISTVERSIONSUFFIX=     -fx+fl
+PORTVERSION=   1.24
+DISTVERSIONSUFFIX=     -fx
 CATEGORIES=    www

 MAINTAINER=    lapo@lapo.it
@@ -16,7 +16,7 @@
 XPI_NUM=       321
 XPI_ID=                {d57c9ff1-6389-48fc-b770-f78bd89b6e8a}
 XPI_FILES=     chrome/searchstatus.jar install.js install.rdf \
-               readme.txt chrome.manifest
+               installjs.old2 readme.txt chrome.manifest
 XPI_DIRS=      chrome

 .include "${.CURDIR}/../xpi-adblock/Makefile.xpi"
